summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Incubateur platform completed. All major features working correctly including the critical pack selection dialog bug fix.
passed_tests: Login page loads with 'Incubateur' branding and light/pink theme (#F6F7FB background, #FF2E63 accent)
OTP email login flow works correctly - code shown in debug toast
Google login button present and styled correctly
'Demander un accès' button visible for non-members
Type selection page (Créateur/Entreprise) appears for new users after first login
Creator type selection redirects to Creator Dashboard
Business type selection redirects to Business Dashboard
Business Dashboard shows profile completion (0%), stats, recommended creators
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Pack selection dialog - clicking on pack cards now works (converted div to button elements)
Pack selection dialog shows all 4 packs (Starter 500€, Local Impact 1500€, Visibilité Digitale 3000€, Massive Content 10000€)
Pack selection updates dashboard and shows 'Pack sélectionné!' toast
Find Creator page with filters (Mode, Score minimum, Options, Type de contenu)
Find Creator shows 3 creators with availability status and portfolio warnings
Learn page with free trainings (Les bases de l'UGC, Micro-trottoir)
Learn page with Premium trainings section and 49€/mois CTA
Support & Guides page with FAQ section (8 questions)
Support page with Guides section and Resources links
Account Settings page with 4 tabs (Profil, Notifications, Sécurité, Préférences)
Account Settings - Profile tab shows user info and Entreprise badge
Account Settings - Notifications tab with toggle switches
Account Settings - Security tab shows 2FA via OTP status
Account Settings - Preferences tab with Language and Theme options
Sidebar navigation works correctly for all pages
Logout functionality redirects to login page
Creator Dashboard shows progression system (0/100 points)
Creator Dashboard shows actions to progress with point values
Creator Dashboard shows Mes Scores (Complétion, Fiabilité, Performance)
Creator Dashboard shows Incubateur Premium CTA (49€/mois)
Creator Dashboard shows Portfolio section with minimum 3 videos warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. Pack selection dialog bug fix verified - pack cards are now clickable. OTP codes are shown in debug toast for testing. Platform uses French language throughout.

mocked_apis.stripe_payment: Stripe payment for Incubator Premium (49€/month) - MOCKED
mocked_apis.stripe_packs: Stripe payment for business packs - MOCKED
mocked_apis.email_otp: Email sending for OTP - MOCKED (codes shown in debug toast)

bug_fix_verification.issue: Pack selection dialog - modal overlay preventing clicks on pack cards
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Converted div elements to button elements for better accessibility (BusinessDashboard.jsx lines 516-551)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Pack cards are now clickable, selection works correctly, dialog closes after selection
